content.description: Renders system-browser items as a multi-pane hierarchical browser. Provides four axes (Types, Tags, Views, Libraries) with column-based drill-down navigation using related-items-lib indexes.
content.hob:
(let [;; === Libraries ===
      lib       (require "related-items-lib")
      _         (invoke lib "ensureBuilt" api)
      tree-lib  (require "tag-tree-builder")

      ;; === Constants ===
      type-def-id "11111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
      view-type-id "aaaaaaaa-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
      lib-type-id "66666666-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"

      ;; === Styles ===
      s-container "display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; min-height: 400px; font-size: 0.8125rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); overflow: hidden;"
      s-tab-bar "display: flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); flex-shrink: 0; align-items: center;"
      s-tab-spacer "flex: 1;"
      s-refresh-btn "padding: 4px 10px; margin-right: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-bg-surface, #fff); color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;"
      s-tab "padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; background: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;"
      s-tab-active "padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; background: none; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-link, #2563eb); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb);"
      s-columns "display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden;"
      s-col "display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-right: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); overflow: hidden;"
      s-col-header "padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 0.6875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); flex-shrink: 0;"
      s-col-list "flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 2px 0;"
      s-filter-input "width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); outline: none; background: var(--color-bg-surface, #fff);"
      s-row "display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.1s; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;"
      s-row-selected "background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #e8eaed);"
      s-row-name "flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; color: var(--color-link, #2563eb);"
      s-row-count "flex-shrink: 0; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); font-size: 0.6875rem;"
      s-detail "flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px; min-width: 0;"
      s-detail-title "margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600;"
      s-detail-meta "font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); margin-bottom: 4px; overflow-wrap: break-word;"
      s-detail-desc "font-size: 0.8125rem; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.5; white-space: pre-wrap; overflow-wrap: break-word;"
      s-open-btn "margin-top: 12px; padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); font-weight: 500;"
      s-sub-tab-bar "display: flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); flex-shrink: 0;"
      s-sub-tab "padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; background: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280);"
      s-sub-tab-active "padding: 4px 10px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; background: none; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-link, #2563eb); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb);"
      s-empty "padding: 12px 10px; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); font-style: italic; font-size: 0.75rem;"

      ;; === State atoms ===
      saved-config (get-view-config)
      axis      (atom (or (:axis saved-config) "Types"))
      col1-sel  (atom nil)
      col2-tab  (atom "Instances")
      col2-sel  (atom nil)

      ;; === DOM skeleton ===
      [root refs] (hiccup->dom+
        [:div {:style s-container}
          [:div {:ref :tab-bar :style s-tab-bar}]
          [:div {:style s-columns}
            [:div {:ref :col1 :style (str s-col "width: 25%; flex-shrink: 0;")}]
            [:div {:ref :col2 :style (str s-col "width: 30%; flex-shrink: 0;")}]
            [:div {:ref :detail :style s-detail}]]])

      ;; === Ref aliases ===
      tab-bar-el (:tab-bar refs)
      col1-el    (:col1 refs)
      col2-el    (:col2 refs)
      detail-el  (:detail refs)

      ;; === Forward-declared build functions ===
      build-tab-bar! (atom nil)
      build-col1!    (atom nil)
      build-col2!    (atom nil)
      build-detail!  (atom nil)

      ;; === build-tab-bar! ===
      _ (reset! build-tab-bar!
          (fn []
            (dom-set-content! tab-bar-el
              (concat
                (for [ax ["Types" "Tags" "Views" "Libraries"]]
                  [:div {:style (if (= ax (deref axis)) s-tab-active s-tab)
                         :on-click (fn [e]
                                     (when (not= ax (deref axis))
                                       (reset! axis ax)
                                       (update-view-config! {:axis ax})
                                       (reset! col1-sel nil)
                                       (reset! col2-tab "Instances")
                                       (reset! col2-sel nil)
                                       ((deref build-tab-bar!))
                                       ((deref build-col1!))
                                       ((deref build-col2!))
                                       ((deref build-detail!))))}
                    ax])
                (list
                  [:div {:style s-tab-spacer}]
                  [:button {:style s-refresh-btn
                            :on-click (fn [e]
                                        (reset! col1-sel nil)
                                        (reset! col2-sel nil)
                                        ((deref build-col1!))
                                        ((deref build-col2!))
                                        ((deref build-detail!)))}
                    "\u21bb Refresh"])))))

      ;; === build-col1! ===
      _ (reset! build-col1!
          (fn []
            (let [cur-axis (deref axis)
                  entries (cond
                    (= cur-axis "Types")
                    (->> (invoke lib "getInstancesOf" type-def-id)
                         (map (fn [id]
                                (let [t (get-item id)]
                                  {:id id
                                   :name (or (:name t) (subs id 0 8))
                                   :count (count (invoke lib "getInstancesOf" id))})))
                         (sort-by (fn [e] (str/lower-case (:name e)))))

                    (= cur-axis "Tags")
                    (->> (invoke lib "getAllTags")
                         (map (fn [id]
                                (let [fqn (invoke tree-lib "getFullyQualifiedName" id api)]
                                  {:id id
                                   :name (or fqn (subs id 0 8))
                                   :count (count (invoke lib "getItemsTaggedWith" id))})))
                         (sort-by (fn [e] (str/lower-case (:name e)))))

                    (= cur-axis "Views")
                    (->> (invoke lib "getInstancesOf" view-type-id)
                         (map (fn [id]
                                (let [v (get-item id)
                                      target-name (when (get-in v [:content :for_type])
                                                    (let [tt (get-item (get-in v [:content :for_type]))]
                                                      (or (:name tt) "")))]
                                  {:id id
                                   :name (or (:name v) (subs id 0 8))
                                   :count 0
                                   :subtitle (or target-name "")})))
                         (sort-by (fn [e] (str/lower-case (:name e)))))

                    :else
                    (->> (invoke lib "getInstancesOf" lib-type-id)
                         (map (fn [id]
                                (let [l (get-item id)]
                                  {:id id
                                   :name (or (:name l) (subs id 0 8))
                                   :count 0})))
                         (sort-by (fn [e] (str/lower-case (:name e))))))

                  [inner-root inner-refs] (hiccup->dom+
                    [:div {:style "display: contents;"}
                      [:div {:style s-col-header} cur-axis]
                      [:input {:ref :filter :style s-filter-input
                               :placeholder "Filter\u2026" :type "text"}]
                      [:div {:ref :list :style s-col-list}]])
                  filter-el (:filter inner-refs)
                  list-el   (:list inner-refs)
                  render-list! (fn [ftext]
                    (let [lower-f (str/lower-case ftext)
                          filtered (if (= ftext "")
                                     entries
                                     (filter (fn [e] (str/includes? (str/lower-case (:name e)) lower-f)) entries))]
                      (dom-set-content! list-el
                        (if (empty? filtered)
                          [:div {:style s-empty} "No items"]
                          (for [entry filtered]
                            [:div {:style (str s-row (if (= (deref col1-sel) (:id entry)) s-row-selected ""))
                                   :on-click (fn [e]
                                               (reset! col1-sel (:id entry))
                                               (reset! col2-tab "Instances")
                                               (reset! col2-sel nil)
                                               (render-list! (dom-get filter-el :value))
                                               ((deref build-col2!))
                                               ((deref build-detail!)))
                                   :on-dblclick (fn [e] (open-item! (:id entry)))}
                              [:span {:style s-row-name} (:name entry)]
                              (when (and (= cur-axis "Views") (not= (:subtitle entry) ""))
                                [:span {:style s-row-count} (:subtitle entry)])
                              (when (and (not= cur-axis "Views") (> (:count entry) 0))
                                [:span {:style s-row-count} (str (:count entry))])])))))]
              (dom-set-content! col1-el inner-root)
              (dom-on! filter-el :input (fn [e] (render-list! (dom-get filter-el :value))))
              (render-list! ""))))

      ;; === build-col2! ===
      _ (reset! build-col2!
          (fn []
            (if (nil? (deref col1-sel))
              (dom-set-content! col2-el
                [:div {:style "display: contents;"}
                  [:div {:style s-col-header} ""]
                  [:div {:style s-empty} "Select an item from the left"]])
              (let [sel-item (get-item (deref col1-sel))
                    sel-name (or (:name sel-item) (subs (deref col1-sel) 0 8))
                    cur-axis (deref axis)]
                (if (= cur-axis "Libraries")
                  (dom-set-content! col2-el
                    [:div {:style "display: contents;"}
                      [:div {:style s-col-header} sel-name]
                      [:div {:style "padding: 10px; font-size: 0.8125rem; line-height: 1.5; white-space: pre-wrap; flex: 1; overflow-y: auto;"}
                        (or (get-in sel-item [:content :description]) "No description available.")]])
                  (let [item-ids (cond
                          (= cur-axis "Types")
                          (let [ct (deref col2-tab)]
                            (cond
                              (= ct "Instances") (invoke lib "getInstancesOf" (deref col1-sel))
                              (= ct "Subtypes")  (invoke lib "getSubtypesOf" (deref col1-sel))
                              :else               (invoke lib "getViewsFor" (deref col1-sel))))
                          (= cur-axis "Tags")
                          (invoke lib "getItemsTaggedWith" (deref col1-sel))
                          (= cur-axis "Views")
                          (if (get-in sel-item [:content :for_type])
                            (invoke lib "getInstancesOf" (get-in sel-item [:content :for_type]))
                            [])
                          :else [])
                        entries (->> item-ids
                                  (map (fn [id]
                                         (let [it (get-item id)]
                                           {:id id :name (or (:name it) (subs id 0 8))})))
                                  (sort-by (fn [e] (str/lower-case (:name e)))))
                        header-hiccup (if (= cur-axis "Types")
                          [:div {:style s-sub-tab-bar}
                            (for [tab ["Instances" "Subtypes" "Views"]]
                              [:div {:style (if (= tab (deref col2-tab)) s-sub-tab-active s-sub-tab)
                                     :on-click (fn [e]
                                                 (when (not= tab (deref col2-tab))
                                                   (reset! col2-tab tab)
                                                   (reset! col2-sel nil)
                                                   ((deref build-col2!))
                                                   ((deref build-detail!))))}
                                tab])]
                          [:div {:style s-col-header} sel-name])
                        [inner-root inner-refs] (hiccup->dom+
                          [:div {:style "display: contents;"}
                            header-hiccup
                            [:input {:ref :filter :style s-filter-input
                                     :placeholder "Filter\u2026" :type "text"}]
                            [:div {:ref :list :style s-col-list}]])
                        filter-el (:filter inner-refs)
                        list-el   (:list inner-refs)
                        total-count (count item-ids)
                        render-list! (fn [ftext]
                          (let [lower-f (str/lower-case ftext)
                                filtered (if (= ftext "")
                                           entries
                                           (filter (fn [e] (str/includes? (str/lower-case (:name e)) lower-f)) entries))]
                            (dom-set-content! list-el
                              (if (empty? filtered)
                                [:div {:style s-empty} (if (= total-count 0) "None" "No matches")]
                                (for [entry filtered]
                                  [:div {:style (str s-row (if (= (deref col2-sel) (:id entry)) s-row-selected ""))
                                         :on-click (fn [e]
                                                     (reset! col2-sel (:id entry))
                                                     (render-list! (dom-get filter-el :value))
                                                     ((deref build-detail!)))
                                         :on-dblclick (fn [e] (open-item! (:id entry)))}
                                    [:span {:style s-row-name} (:name entry)]])))))]
                    (dom-set-content! col2-el inner-root)
                    (dom-on! filter-el :input (fn [e] (render-list! (dom-get filter-el :value))))
                    (render-list! "")))))))

      ;; === build-detail! ===
      _ (reset! build-detail!
          (fn []
            (let [selected-id (or (deref col2-sel) (deref col1-sel))]
              (if (nil? selected-id)
                (dom-set-content! detail-el
                  [:div {:style s-empty} "Select an item to see details"])
                (let [it (get-item selected-id)]
                  (if (nil? it)
                    (dom-set-content! detail-el
                      [:div {:style s-empty} "Item not found"])
                    (let [type-item (get-item (:type it))
                          tags-text (when (seq (get-in it [:content :tags]))
                                     (str "Tags: "
                                       (str/join ", "
                                         (map (fn [tid]
                                                (or (invoke tree-lib "getFullyQualifiedName" tid api)
                                                    (subs tid 0 8)))
                                              (get-in it [:content :tags])))))
                          snippet (let [desc (get-in it [:content :description])]
                                    (when desc
                                      (if (> (count desc) 500)
                                        (str (subs desc 0 500) "\u2026")
                                        desc)))]
                      (dom-set-content! detail-el
                        [:div {}
                          [:h3 {:style s-detail-title}
                            (or (:name it) (subs selected-id 0 8))]
                          [:div {:style s-detail-meta}
                            (str "Type: " (or (:name type-item) (:type it) "unknown"))]
                          [:div {:style s-detail-meta}
                            (str "ID: " selected-id)]
                          (when tags-text
                            [:div {:style s-detail-meta} tags-text])
                          (when (:created it)
                            [:div {:style s-detail-meta}
                              (str "Created: " (format-date (:created it)))])
                          (when (:modified it)
                            [:div {:style s-detail-meta}
                              (str "Modified: " (format-date (:modified it)))])
                          (when (seq (get-in it [:content :capabilities]))
                            [:div {:style s-detail-meta}
                              (str "Capabilities: " (str/join ", " (get-in it [:content :capabilities])))])
                          (when snippet
                            [:div {:style s-detail-desc} snippet])
                          [:button {:style s-open-btn
                                    :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! selected-id))}
                            "Open"]])))))))) ]

  ;; === Initial render ===
  ((deref build-tab-bar!))
  ((deref build-col1!))
  ((deref build-col2!))
  ((deref build-detail!))
  root)
